text: Lesson 30
zh: 第30课

text: The death of a ghost
zh: 幽灵之死

text: Why did the two brothers keep the secret?
zh: 为什么这两兄弟一直保守秘密？

text: For years, villagers believed that Endley farm was haunted.
zh: 多年来，村民们一直认为恩德利农场闹鬼。

text: The farm was owned by two brothers, Joe and Bob Cox.
zh: 这座农场归乔和鲍勃·考克斯兄弟俩所有。

text: They employed a few farmhands, but no one was willing to work there long.
zh: 他们雇了几个农工，但没人愿意在那里干长久。

text: Every time a worker gave up his job, he told the same story.
zh: 每次有工人辞工，说的都是同一个故事。

text: Farm labourers said that they always woke up to find that work had been done overnight.
zh: 农场工人说，他们每天醒来都会发现活儿在夜里已经被做完了。

text: Hay had been cut and cowsheds had been cleaned.
zh: 干草已经割好，牛棚也打扫干净了。

text: A farm worker, who stayed up all night, claimed to have seen a figure cutting corn in the moonlight.
zh: 有个彻夜未眠的农工声称，看见月光下有个身影在割玉米。

text: In time, it became an accepted fact that the Cox brothers employed a conscientious ghost that did most of their work for them.
zh: 久而久之，大家都认定考克斯兄弟雇了一个尽职的幽灵，替他们干了大部分活。

text: No one suspected that there might be someone else on the farm who had never been seen.
zh: 没人怀疑农场里可能还有一个从未露面的人。

text: This was indeed the case.
zh: 事实的确如此。

text: A short time ago, villagers were astonished to learn that the ghost of Endley had died.
zh: 不久前，村民们惊讶地得知，恩德利的那个“幽灵”去世了。

text: Everyone went to the funeral, for the 'ghost' was none other than Eric Cox,
zh: 所有人都去参加了葬礼，因为那个“幽灵”不是别人，正是埃里克·考克斯，

text: a third brother who was supposed to have died as a young man.
zh: 他是家中的第三个兄弟，本被以为年轻时就已去世。

text: After the funeral, Joe and Bob revealed a secret which they had kept for over fifty years.
zh: 葬礼结束后，乔和鲍勃透露了一个他们保守了五十多年的秘密。

text: Eric had been the eldest son of the family, very much older than his two brothers.
zh: 埃里克是家中的长子，比他两个弟弟大得多。

text: He had been obliged to join the army during the Second World War.
zh: 第二次世界大战期间，他被迫参军入伍。

text: As he hated army life, he decided to desert his regiment.
zh: 由于厌恶军旅生活，他决定从部队开小差。

text: When he learnt that he would be sent abroad,
zh: 当他得知自己将被派往海外时，

text: he returned to the farm and his father hid him until the end of the war.
zh: 他跑回了农场，父亲把他藏了起来，一直藏到战争结束。

text: Fearing the authorities, Eric remained in hiding after the war as well.
zh: 由于害怕当局追查，战后埃里克依然躲藏着。

text: His father told everybody that Eric had been killed in action.
zh: 他父亲告诉所有人，埃里克已经在战斗中阵亡。

text: The only other people who knew the secret were Joe and Bob.
zh: 唯二知道这个秘密的人是乔和鲍勃。

text: They did not even tell their wives.
zh: 他们甚至没有告诉自己的妻子。

text: When their father died they thought it their duty to keep Eric in hiding.
zh: 父亲去世后，他们认为让埃里克继续藏身是自己的责任。

text: All these years, Eric had lived as a recluse.
zh: 这么多年来，埃里克一直过着隐居的生活。

text: He used to sleep during the day and work at night,
zh: 他总是白天睡觉，夜里干活，

text: quite unaware of the fact that he had become the ghost of Endley.
zh: 完全不知道自己已经成了恩德利的“幽灵”。

text: When he died, however, his brothers found it impossible to keep the secret any longer.
zh: 然而，他一去世，兄弟俩就再也无法继续保守这个秘密了。
